sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111215" key="filo/kenos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-κενος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111215.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving emptiness,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στόμα </foreign>( <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ματαιολόγον</ref> </xr>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
